com.dtwthalion.ttio.Spectrum

Description

  • Uses of Spectrum in com.dtwthalion.ttio

    Subclasses of Spectrum in com.dtwthalion.ttio
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Chromatogram
    Chromatogram: time-vs-intensity trace.
    class 
    IRSpectrum
    1-D infrared spectrum: wavenumber + intensity arrays plus mode (absorbance vs.
    class 
    MassSpectrum
    A mass spectrum: m/z + intensity arrays plus MS level, polarity, scan window, and optional precursor activation / isolation metadata.
    class 
    NMR2DSpectrum
    2-D NMR spectrum: row-major double[] intensity matrix of width × height points plus F1 and F2 axis descriptors.
    class 
    NMRSpectrum
    1-D NMR spectrum: chemical-shift + intensity arrays plus nucleus type and spectrometer frequency in MHz.
    class 
    RamanSpectrum
    1-D Raman spectrum: wavenumber + intensity arrays plus laser excitation / power / integration metadata.
    class 
    TwoDimensionalCorrelationSpectrum
    2D correlation spectrum (Noda 2D-COS): synchronous + asynchronous rank-2 correlation matrices sharing a single spectral-variable axis (ν1 = ν2).
    class 
    UVVisSpectrum
    1-D UV-visible absorption spectrum: wavelength (nm) and absorbance channels plus path-length and solvent metadata.
